name: Legendary Blades
description: Legendary Blades is the Legendary counterpart of the Air Skylander, Blades, in Skylanders: Trap Team. He is mainly available in the Legendary bundle of the Nightmare Express, along with the Legendary Hand of Fate and the Piggy Bank.
biography: For centuries, Skylanders have competed in gladiator-style events inside epic arenas of sport, where only the greatest of combatants become immortalized as magical, golden statues that stand watch as guardians. These are the Legendary Skylanders. Whenever the world is in peril, special Portal Masters can bring these statues to life and summon the Legendary Skylanders to defend Skylands against any evil that threatens it.
personality: Blades is a brave, disciplined dragon with a strong sense of duty and justice. Having spent years guarding a dungeon against intruders, he is always alert and ready for a challenge, possessing a wit as sharp as his metallic wings.

story.content: Blades was born into a long line of dragons who guarded the dungeon of the Fearless Knights. For centuries, they protected the castle from those who wished to plunder it. Blades proved himself to be the greatest of these guardians, until a great evil threatened all of Skylands, leading him to join the Skylanders.

trivia: Legendary Blades is a blue and gold color swap of the standard Blades.
He was released exclusively in the Toys 'R' Us Legendary Nightmare Express Adventure Pack.
gameplay: Legendary Blades focuses on high-speed melee combat using his wings and long-range shard projectiles. He can create cyclones to trap enemies and uses his agility to navigate the battlefield quickly, making him a versatile Air element fighter.

basic.name: Wing Slice
basic.content: A quick melee strike with metallic wings.

basic.name: Blade Shards
basic.content: Shoot sharp shards of metal at enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: Cyclone Swirl
basic_upgrades.content: Create a spinning cyclone to damage and knock back foes.

soulgems.name: Crushing Cyclones
soulgems.content: Cyclones deal massive damage and pull in enemies.

abilities.name: Shard Storm
abilities.content: Fires more shards at a faster rate.
